readme:
### What it does

RunPod GPU Cloud provides full control over your RunPod infrastructure through 43 MCP tools. Manage GPU pods, deploy serverless inference endpoints, configure templates, and provision persistent storage — all from your AI agent.

### Tool coverage

| Domain | Tools | What you can do |
|--------|-------|-----------------|
| Infrastructure | 2 | List GPU types, browse datacentres |
| Pods | 5 | Create, update, start, stop, delete GPU pods |
| Endpoints | 5 | Create, update, delete serverless endpoints |
| Serverless | 7 | Submit jobs (sync/async), stream output, cancel, retry, health check, purge queue |
| Templates | 5 | Create, update, delete pod/endpoint templates |
| Network Volumes | 5 | Create, update, delete persistent storage |
| Registry Auth | 4 | Manage private container registry credentials |
| GPU Inventory | 2 | List available GPU types and datacentre capacity |

### Serverless workflow

Deploy a model endpoint, submit inference jobs, and stream results in real-time. The `runsync-endpoint` tool blocks until the job completes — ideal for interactive use. For batch workloads, `run-endpoint` submits asynchronously and `stream-job` streams output as it's generated.

### Community plugin

This wraps the official [runpod/runpod-mcp](https://github.com/runpod/runpod-mcp) TypeScript server maintained by RunPod. It is listed as a community plugin because it is not built or maintained by Stallari.

### Safety

This MCP exposes full write access to your RunPod account. Creating pods incurs GPU compute charges immediately. Deleting resources is destructive and irreversible. Use with appropriate cost awareness.

env.name: RUNPOD_API_KEY
env.description: RunPod API key for authentication — all tools require this

setup.blurb: GPU cloud management — 43 tools for pods, serverless endpoints, templates, and volumes. Deploy models and run inference on H100, A100, and RTX GPUs.
setup.help_text: Create an API key at runpod.io/console/user/settings. The key provides full access to your RunPod account including creating pods (which incur GPU charges).

fields.label: API Key
fields.placeholder: Create at runpod.io → Settings → API Keys
fields.help: Full-access API key. Pod creation incurs GPU compute charges immediately.

scenarios.label: Deploy an inference endpoint
scenarios.body: List available GPU types, create a serverless endpoint with a container image, submit a test job via runsync, and verify the response.

scenarios.label: Spin up a GPU pod for development
scenarios.body: Browse GPU availability, create a pod with SSH access and a network volume for persistent storage, then connect.

scenarios.label: Cost audit — list all active resources
scenarios.body: List all pods and endpoints, check their GPU types and hourly rates, identify idle resources, and stop or delete anything not in use.

notes: Official RunPod MCP server. 43 tools covering the full API surface. TypeScript, npm-distributed. Uses REST and GraphQL APIs. No write gating — all tools execute immediately. Cost-sensitive: pod creation starts GPU billing instantly.
